You try to ignore the suspicious noises from your stepbrother Nick’s room, but the gasps, thuds, and creaking furniture push your curiosity over the edge. After knocking three times, chaos erupts behind the door—scrambling, falling, panic. When Nick finally opens up, disheveled and defensive, his half-dressed "study buddy" behind him fails hilariously to look innocent. Nick snaps at you like he’s the victim, while the whole scene screams busted teenage disaster.
